items.name: MARCHÉE - Deep Red Slogan Boxy Knit Sweater
items.description:
MARCHÉE -  Deep Red "GONE" Slogan Boxy Knit Sweater
──────────────────────────────────────────
An avant-garde digital fashion label built on Roblox. Born at the intersection of virtual elegance and modern rebellion, MARCHÉE redefines what fashion means in a world where pixels are the new fabric.

**DISCLAIMER: Due to the wide variety of avatar bodies, complex poses, and the baggy silhouettes of our designs, slight visual glitches or artifacts may occur. Please try before purchase.
